- 修复使用 ASS 字幕时视频画面缩放按钮无效的问题
- 优化含大量 4K 视频时网格视图的滑动流畅度
- 移除 R8 代码混淆，保留可读堆栈信息以便排查问题

<details>
<summary>English Version</summary>

- Fixed video content scale buttons not working with ASS subtitle wrapper
- Improved grid view scrolling performance with large 4K video collections
- Disabled R8 obfuscation to preserve readable stack traces for debugging
